title: Whispers of the Rift
description: Investigate the strange rift activity near Crydee and report back.

objectives.description: Find the rift site near the forest ruins.

title: Aid the Crydee Guard
description: Help defend the frontier by clearing out nearby bandit camps.

objectives.description: Defeat 3 bandits near the western trail.

title: Clear the Outskirts
description: Scouts have reported corrupted wolves roaming the forest. Eliminate the threat.

objectives.description: Defeat 3 corrupted wolves in the Forest Outskirts.

title: Beneath the Corrupted Grove
description: Enter the Rift site and destroy the guardian within.

objectives.description: Approach the Rift site in the forest.

title: Mud and Iron
description: Captain Rennic needs the approach stabilized before more refugees can move east. Secure the Ashfall Redoubt and break the raider line around it.

objectives.description: Defeat 2 Trench Raiders near the redoubt.

title: Signals for Krondor
description: Scout Tavia wants the road signs and signal points checked before the next convoy attempts the inland route.

title: Under the War Road
description: Investigate the Culvert Breach, destroy the corruption source below, and recover anything that explains what happened to the roadwardens posted there.

objectives.description: Reach the Culvert Breach in Warfront Approach.
Locate the Rift heart inside the breach.
Bring the dispatches back to Captain Rennic.

title: Secure the Mileway
description: Roadwarden Serik needs the western checkpoint, staging yard, and eastern gate held long enough for regular Krondor traffic to begin moving again. The inland city has been starved of western support long enough.

objectives.description: Defeat 2 Road Reavers along the main road.

title: Ledger at the Tollhouse
description: A supply convoy destined for Krondor never reached the eastern gate. Find out what happened at the broken tollhouse and bring back word before panic spreads down the supply chain.

objectives.description: Report the caravan's fate to Caravan Handler Lysa.

title: Relay Under Stone
description: The road can be patrolled without a live relay, but it cannot be trusted. Restore the buried station beneath the North Relay and bring the signal back online—Krondor's garrisons depend on knowing the western corridor still stands.

objectives.description: Defeat the Relay Saboteur below the station.
Report to Scout Miren when the relay is lit.

title: The Sealed Nexus
description: Even with the road restored, a quiet knot of Rift pressure persists near the eastern passage. Break the ritual forming there before Krondor feels the strain—the city has little strength left to spare for new threats.

objectives.description: Return to report the ritual's end.
